Khavatari Kashu:
Have you ever seen anything like this? It's a very secretive place, isn't it? If it weren't for the directions you found, we probably wouldn't have found it.
But Pa'agrio ,ust be watching over us, because we finally found it not long ago!
From my observations, I've learned that this is where the Kasha Orcs perform their 'ritual' to gain power.
Apparently, the ridiculous strenght they display is not a natural result of simply training their bodies.
Most of the orcs who have entered this place have left with stronger bodies, though some have literally exploded because they couldn't handle the power.
